ksa_text: Skill in managing metadata and data lineage governance, including metadata standards definition, data lineage documentation and tracking, provenance management, and impact analysis frameworks for organizational data transformations.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DG-S-015 (Data Governance/Skill) is excluded as out_of_scope (composite 0.000, highest: DCWF at 0.000). The KSA describes responsibilities at an executive or organizational leadership level above the IC/senior IC Data Engineer boundary.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency identified. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope classification, composite 0.000, and Data Governance (DG) handling. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Zero-signal exclusion: does absence of framework signal reliably indicate irrelevance for the Data Engineer role?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Composite 0.0 across 6 frameworks confirms no semantic alignment with any DE reference element. Market analysis does not surface these competencies as DE requirements.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Zero framework signal confirmed by market absence. Final decision: exclude.
